GOE Alliance · TOTM · Sepolia Testnet · Live KYC

Cross-Border KYC Identity on Chain

Indonesia KYC → on-chain identity proof → cross-border transfer to Vietnam
Zero personal data ever touches the blockchain.

⚡ Live Mode Active — Real InterBio authentication, enrollment, and ID-to-face verification are enabled.
🇮🇩 Indonesia KYC
→
InterBio API (live)
→
DIDRegistry (Sepolia)
→
🌉 Bridge Contract
→
🇻🇳 Vietnam Wallet
1
Wallet
2
KYC
3
Whitelist
4
Transfer
✓
Done
Step 1 — Connect Wallet

Connect your MetaMask wallet or use the pre-funded Demo Wallet to anchor your identity on-chain.

Step 2 — Indonesia KYC Verification

Enter a valid NIK and upload a clear face image. The app calls InterBio Enroll first, then IDToBio verification.

No file selected
Privacy layer: Only mapping(wallet → bool) goes on-chain. No NIK, name, or face data stored anywhere on-chain.
Step 3 — Identity Registered On-Chain
Step 4 — Cross-Border Transfer 🇮🇩 → 🇻🇳

The CrossBorderBridge contract checks DIDRegistry.isVerified(sender) before allowing any transfer.

—
Bridge TXs
—
Volume (ETH)
—
Verified Wallets
🇮🇩 Indonesia (Sender)
→
🇻🇳 Vietnam (Recipient)
How it works: Contract checks isVerified(sender) → if true → ETH sends + emits CrossBorderTransfer event. In a ZKP upgrade, this becomes a Groth16 proof verification call.
Transfer Complete
Check Any Wallet

Public read — checks on-chain verification status. No personal data returned.

Zero personal data on-chain · Only cryptographic proof of verification
